objective: Promote the replay-preflighted signature target into a small exact metadata shard with value-unique split semantics and deterministic floors.
non_negotiables: The promoted shard must be exact rows, not heuristic diagnostics.
Signature fields are auxiliary exact.value metadata over the depth-two local-move exact thermograph value, not a new ExactValueClass.
The exact shard must pass replay and Partizan leakage gates.
The support limit must be stated: value-unique exact promotion reaches 13 rows, not the full 60-row diagnostic support.

tasks.prompt: Add an Astralbase signature-target exact shard command that emits verified depth-two local-move exact rows and preserves signature metadata under exact.value, with self-unique component/result value digests for leakage-safe Partizan splits.
acceptance: exact.value.result_signature_key and component signatures are present.
The exact shard replays under the existing non-fixture composed-domain replay verifier.

tasks.prompt: Generate the Wave 47 exact metadata shard from Astralbase, replay it, validate schema, build a leakage split report, and build a deterministic train-majority floor over exact.value.result_signature_key.
acceptance: The shard contains 13 exact rows and no heuristic rows.
The replay report checks all 13 exact rows with zero skipped non-target rows.
The split report has zero duplicate positions, row IDs, component value digests, result value digests, and cross-split digest leakage.
The target floor reports train/dev/test accuracy 0.0909/0.0/0.0 with dev/test labels unseen.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 47 as a small leakage-clean exact metadata shard and keep model readiness blocked by support scale and learned-baseline evidence.
acceptance: Docs state that Wave 47 is exact and replay-valid but small.
Claims C2 and C5 identify support scale and learned baselines as the remaining blockers.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_47_signature_exact_metadata_shard.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 47 plan is internally consistent.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/label_schema.py validate docs/signature_target_exact_wave_47.jsonl && python3 engine/ml_model.py validate-report docs/signature_target_exact_wave_47_split_report.json --fail-on-leakage
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 47 exact shard is schema-valid and leakage-clean.
